heading: Applications
label: 1059a Applications
text: Each eligible institution desiring to receive assistance under this part shall submit an application in accordance with the requirements of .section 1068 of this title
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1059a, , as added , , , related to application review process, prior to repeal by , title III, § 303(d), , , 1639, effective .Pub.
